title: Add sliding-window eval to MLX trainer
author: FlorinelTudor

data.description: Added GPT.forward_logits to enable MLX evaluation to score per-token negative log-likelihood over overlapping windows.

novel_contributions: Added sliding-window evaluation support to the MLX trainer behind EVAL_STRIDE and EVAL_BATCH_SEQS.
Added GPT.forward_logits so MLX evaluation can score per-token NLL over overlapping windows.
Added focused tests for sliding-window coverage and scoring behavior.
